title: ELEMENTARY INVARIANTS FOR CENTRALIZERS OF NILPOTENT MATRICES
journal: Journal of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: AbstractWe construct an explicit set of algebraically independent generators for the center of the universal enveloping algebra of the centralizer of a nilpotent matrix in the general linear Lie algebra over a field of characteristic zero. In particular, this gives a new proof of the freeness of the center, a result first proved by Panyushev, Premet and Yakimova.
